basics.name: Jiatong Zhao
basics.summary: Undergraduate researcher working on reinforcement learning for reasoning, verifiable AI systems, and multimodal reasoning evaluation.

work.name: THU C3I
work.summary: Working on scalable reasoning systems under the supervision of Ning Ding.

work.name: Big AI Dream Lab, Shanghai AI Lab
work.summary: Worked on AI reasoning research under the supervision of Jie Fu.

work.name: SAI, Shanghai Jiao Tong University
work.summary: Worked on GeoBench under the supervision of Junchi Yan and Renqiu Xia.

publications.name: GeoBench: Rethinking Multimodal Geometric Problem-Solving via Hierarchical Evaluation
publications.summary: A hierarchical benchmark for multimodal geometry reasoning that decomposes failures into visual perception, goal-oriented planning, theorem application, and self-reflective backtracking.

publications.name: Co4ICF: Co-evolving Physics-informed Surrogate and RL-based Pulse Optimizer for Inertial Confinement Fusion
publications.summary: A closed-loop AI4Physics system coupling a physics-informed surrogate with an RL-based optimizer for pulse design.
